title: crotalaria curtata
intro: Crotalaria curtata, also known as the 'curta pea bush', is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Crotalaria curtata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
